promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next concrete residual paired-family refinement immediately after the prior A2-mid Bell-seed batch deferred this dual-init trajectory family.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the strongest family-level seams: pair identity, Bell-versus-Ginibre trajectory-negativity asymmetry, trajectory negativity versus positive final-state conditional entropy, init-qualified sequence-order direction, MI-versus-trajectory-SAgB decoupling, and local evidence without repo-top admission.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The adjacent Bell-seed A2-mid batch provides the local nonnegativity comparison packet, the AB A2-mid batch provides a nearby metric anti-collapse style, and the sims evidence-boundary batch provides the local evidence versus repo-top omission pattern.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because it is the next residual pair and must stay outside this bounded metrics pass.
Not selected because it would erase the metrics-versus-suite boundary and the init-qualified distinctions preserved by the parent batch.
Not selected because the parent family batch already contains the needed bounded seams.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent trajectory-metrics batch plus nearby A2-mid sims anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable shell, Bell-versus-Ginibre split, trajectory-versus-final-state seam, init-qualified directionality, metric decoupling, and evidence-status packets without reopening raw sims files.

candidate_items.name: AXIS0_TRAJ_CORR_PAIR_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the cleanest shell for the dual-init trajectory-correlation residual pair.

candidate_items.name: BELL_VS_GINIBRE_TRAJECTORY_NEGATIVITY_SPLIT_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest Bell-versus-Ginibre init-regime split in the stored trajectory negativity.

candidate_items.name: TRAJECTORY_NEGATIVITY_WITH_POSITIVE_FINAL_STATE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest anti-collapse packet between Bell trajectory negativity and positive final-state conditional entropy.

candidate_items.name: INIT_QUALIFIED_SEQUENCE_DIRECTION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest init-qualified directionality packet from the sign-flipping sequence deltas.

candidate_items.name: MI_VS_SAGB_TRAJECTORY_DECOUPLING_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest metric-decoupling packet between trajectory MI and positive trajectory S(A|B) means.

candidate_items.name: LOCAL_TRAJ_EVIDENCE_WITHOUT_REPOTOP_ADMISSION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's main visibility contradiction for the trajectory-metrics family.

quarantined_items.name: BELL_TRAJECTORY_NEGATIVITY_AS_NEGATIVE_FINAL_STATE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Bell trajectory negativity is weaker than negative final-state proof because both Bell final S(A|B) means remain positive.

quarantined_items.name: SMALL_SEQUENCE_DELTAS_AS_INIT_INDEPENDENT_DIRECTION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The sequence-order deltas are small and flip sign across init modes, so they do not justify one init-independent direction story.

quarantined_items.name: MI_AND_POSITIVE_SAGB_TRAJECTORY_MEANS_AS_CO_MOVING
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Higher Bell trajectory MI is weaker than a co-moving metric story because Ginibre carries the larger positive trajectory S(A|B) mean.

quarantined_items.name: BELL_AND_GINIBRE_AS_ONE_REGIME_STORY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: One runner is weaker than one unified regime interpretation because the stored trajectory negativity behavior differs materially across the two init modes.

quarantined_items.name: LOCAL_EVIDENCE_AS_REPOTOP_ADMISSION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Catalog presence and local evidence are both weaker than repo-top evidence admission.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the strongest reusable family-level packets from the trajectory-metrics batch without reopening raw sims files.

They keep pair identity, Bell-versus-Ginibre asymmetry, trajectory-versus-final-state separation, init-qualified directionality, metric decoupling, and local-only evidence status distinct instead of collapsing them into one story.
They remain small, source-linked, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later residual family work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain final-state overreads, init-flattening overreads, metric-coupling overreads, regime-collapse overreads, or admission-overreads rather than reusable A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated entirely from existing intake artifacts after the required control-surface reads already completed earlier in the thread.
Used nearby A2-mid sims batches only as comparison anchors.
No raw source reread, runtime execution, or A2-1 mutation was performed.
